title: bastardia triquetra
intro: Bastardia triquetra, also known as bastard toadflax, is a flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bastardia triquetra include its ability to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, Bastardia triquetra is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
